message:
Remove debug eprintln! statements from FrankenSQLite connection layer

Strip all development-time debug logging (eprintln!) from connection.rs
that was left over from the RETURNING * and column-name inference
implementation work. Removes logging from query_sync(),
get_returning_star_columns(), execute_sync(), and
convert_rows_with_schema(). No functional logic changes; purely noise
removal for cleaner production output.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
